productDisplayName: ANT Kids Girls Solid White Short
description: Composition White shorts made of 100% cotton, has two pockets on the sides, one pocket on the right back, looped waist, button and zipper closure on the front, floral printed panel detailing on the front and back pocket, and stitch detailing in pink Fitting Comfort Wash care Dry clean preferred Wash separately using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry flat in shade Do not iron directly on decorations Crafted from soft cotton fabric, this pretty short from ant is all set to offer absolute all-day comfort for your little girl, while she enjoys with her playmates. The pretty floral panels and stitch detailing give this short a beach vacation vibe. Team it with pretty tops or t-shirts and sneakers.
